title: Page Builder Functionality in Monday for Layout Design
excerpt:
Hello, I’m looking for a way to design a custom layout for the data in my Monday boards, much like the Page Builder Extension does in Airtable.

posts.author: WHP (Will Hyler)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I’m looking for a way to design a custom layout for the data in my Monday boards, much like the Page Builder Extension does in Airtable.

We want to add links, images, and paragraphs of information in a board item, then display that data on a page in a custom layout. The goal is to be able to have basic format control over each of these elements much like a simple whiteboard space so their visibility/legibility/attractiveness can be tailored to our needs. The data would live in the board and updates would be reflected on the page.

The Page Builder Extension is more or less exactly what we’re looking for, but I am not finding a similar solution for Monday.

Thanks in advance for any ideas you share!
